1. Intro to Objections.mp4 All right, welcome to the objection handling section. We're going to be going through some common objections from a wide range of niches here. Information product niche, investor niche, meaning people who are raising money, the automation niche. We'll try to go through examples for all of these with common objections from a list that my clients and their sales teams have provided to me. Enjoy the perspective.
